name: Fearless
overview: Emma Banville, a human rights lawyer known for defending lost causes, sets out to prove the innocence of Kevin Russell, who was convicted for the murder of a school girl 14 years earlier.

trailers.title: Fearless | Starring Helen McCrory, Michael Gambon & John Bishop | ITV Hub | ITV
